- [x] Verify the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  Summary: Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind + Supabase social app assessment requirements were captured and planned.

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  Summary: Project scaffold completed in current directory with App Router, linting, and build scripts.

- [x] Customize the Project
  Summary: Implemented auth, profile CRUD, posts, likes, comments, follow graph, feed, storage uploads, and minimal UI.

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  Summary: No required extensions were specified by setup info.

- [x] Compile the Project
  Summary: Typecheck, lint, and production build pass.

- [x] Create and Run Task
  Summary: No tasks.json required for this assessment workflow.

- [x] Launch the Project
  Summary: App launch command is documented and validated through build checks.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  Summary: README and copilot-instructions are present and updated.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
